heading: EMINENT DOMAIN
operative_text: An independent school district may, by the exercise of the right of eminent domain, acquire the fee simple title to real property on which to construct school buildings or for any other public use necessary for the district.
_note: Subsections (b)-(d) detail condemnation proceedings modeled on railroad condemnation statutes, possession pending suit, and appeal procedures. No explicit cross-references to other code sections appear in the text.
